{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322073000ABBAC4887C0BE871EDDD"}"},"total":170},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7500274036133167897","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常不错的一本小说值得推荐"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1746304590,"group_id":"7441131227790199832","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7JgtupyyQqW8BfC8lzpP3eUrBKQugUEQoRYly8yi7dq","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2119460260422606","user_name":"用户21194602"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2119460260422606","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7441131227790199832","book_info":{"abstract":"苏晨穿越到平行世界，高考落榜后，接手了原身老爸的民用模具厂，绑定了超级军工黑科技系统。
　　开局，他生产出了核动力航母级材料模具，惊呆龙科院大佬！
　　本以为要收手的他，居然又跑去骆驼地区当军火供应商！
　　疯狂兜售超级火箭炮高精密炮筒，炸哭了鹰酱！
　　从此，他在刑法的道路上，越走越远！
　　若干年后……
　　鹰酱国：该死！当初到底是谁让他高考落榜的？让他好好当个清澈又愚蠢的大学生不好吗？！
